rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND TOWNSEND et al VS. ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Defendant John Crane Inc.S Motion For Summary Judgment And Or Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, JULY 29, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Defendant John Crane, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, alternatively, summary adjudication is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed May 27, 2014. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JODIE D. COLLINS SR. et al VS. CRANE CO. et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, JULY 29, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 2, Defendant Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.'s demurrer to first amended complaint is continued on the court's own motion to July 31, 2014. = (503/TLJ)
